dealSummary: Databricks is in talks to raise a new round at a valuation of up to $175 billion, The Information reported.
Finnish satellite maker Iceye raised €450 million in a Series F led by General Atlantic and a €550 million secondary round at a valuation of more than €10 billion.
leadInvestors: General Atlantic, a €550 million secondary round

dealSummary: NinjaOne, the developer of an IT operations platform, raised $400 million in Series C extensions from investors including Wellington Management, Teachers' Venture Growth and BDT & MSD Partners at a $12.3 billion valuation.
leadInvestors: Wellington Management, Teachers' Venture Growth, BDT & MSD Partners

dealSummary: Isar Aerospace, a German provider of launch services for small and medium-sized satellites and satellite constellations, secured a €270 million Series D led by Island Green Capital and Molten Ventures.
Beacon, which acquires software companies and develops a business operating system, secured a $225 million Series C led by General Catalyst and HarbourVest.
Robotics startup Standard Bots raised a $200 million Series C led by RoboStrategy at a $1 billion valuation.
Medical device company GT Medical Technologies, which develops devices to treat brain tumors, raised a $100 million Series E led by Viking Global.
Biopharma startup City Therapeutics, which focuses on RNA interference-based medicine, secured a $99.5 million Series B from investors including Viking Global and Sofinnova Investments.
Rylo, which develops a communication platform for the Deaf and hard-of-hearing community, raised an $85 million round from investors including General Catalyst and Canaan Partners.
Alta Ares, a Paris-based maker of air defense and autonomous systems, raised €50 million in a round led by Air Street Capital.
Los Angeles-based hybrid RV trailer builder Evotrex received a $30 million Series A from investors including GSR United Capital, Forebright Concerto Capital and TTGG Ventures.
leadInvestors: GSR United Capital, Forebright Concerto Capital, TTGG Ventures

dealSummary: Earlytrade, the operator of a payment marketplace for construction subcontractors, raised $25 million, which includes a Series A led by S3 Ventures and Brick & Mortar Ventures.
Fonio.ai, an Austrian developer of AI-powered customer communication tools, received a $17 million seed investment led by 20VC.
